data.content:
Implementation handoff capsule
- Branch: knots-90a5-nested-cache (pushed to origin)
- Commit: db5b42308ebc54e244fd8722d43d73f1945fad5d
- New module: src/doctor_nested_cache.rs (check_nested_caches_at)
- Tests: src/doctor_nested_cache_tests.rs (8 tests, all pass)
- Wiring: src/doctor.rs run_doctor_at appended new check; src/main.rs mod doctor_nested_cache
- Behavior: WARN with one `rm -rf <path>` line per detected nested cache; data.nested = sorted Vec<String>; PASS otherwise
- Acceptance mapping: AC1+AC2 verified by nested_cache_detected_warns_and_lists_path and multiple_nested_caches_all_listed_sorted; AC3 by clean_repo_has_no_warning + worktree_internal_knots_not_flagged + empty_nested_knots_dir_without_cache_is_ignored + missing_outer_cache_passes_when_store_empty; AC4 covered by both positive and negative tests.
- Sanity: `make sanity` passes, coverage 95.08% (+0.01%).
